Header.value: Rate this Burmese translation of an English how-to instruction

1) Instruction-Followability (1-5): could a Burmese reader correctly carry out this step from the Burmese translation ALONE? 1 = would fail / do the wrong action; 3 = mostly right, minor ambiguity; 5 = perfectly followable.
2) Adequacy (1-5): is the meaning fully preserved vs the English? 1 = meaning lost/wrong; 5 = fully preserved.
